concatenated_transcript:
user: Hello. <Block interruptions enabled. This message was ignored> 
 assistant: Hallo! Hier spricht Avira von TaskMeister. Ich hoffe, Sie haben einen schönen Tag. Hätten Sie kurz einen Moment Zeit? 
 user: Hello. 
 assistant: Hello! I'm Avira calling on behalf of a client who needs a plumber in Berlin for a pipe leak. Do you have availability to help with this? 
 user: Who are you? 
 assistant: I am Avira from TaskMeister. We help connect clients with service providers. My client has a pipe leak in Berlin and needs a plumber urgently. 
 user: Oh yeah, yes, I will be available. 
 assistant: That's great to hear. Could you please provide your name and phone number so I can pass your details along to the client? 
 user: Why is that? 
 assistant: So the client can contact you directly to schedule the appointment and discuss the details of the pipe leak repair. 
 user: Uh, what is the budget of the repair? 
 assistant: I don't have the specific budget details, but the client will discuss that with you directly when you connect. 
 user: Okay, I will think and call. 
 assistant: Alright, thank you for your time. Have a nice day. Goodbye. 
 user: And bye. 
 agent-action: Ended call 
 assistant: Goodbye.
